---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for variantlab
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why does it matter?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API, behavior, or workflow you'd like to see. Code snippets are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why did you reject them?

## Affected packages

- [ ] `@variantlab/core`
- [ ] `@variantlab/react`
- [ ] `@variantlab/react-native`
- [ ] `@variantlab/next`
- [ ] `@variantlab/cli`

## Additional context

Links to design docs, prior art in other libraries, benchmarks, or anything else that strengthens the proposal.

## Design docs

Does this require a change to `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `API.md`, or a new RFC in `docs/design/`?
